title: notopappus chryseus
intro: Notopappus chryseus, also known as the yellow daisy bush or yellow marguerite, is a flowering shrub native to South America. The plant contains flavonoids, which are compounds with potential medicinal properties, including anti-inflammatory and antioxidant effects. Notopappus chryseus has been used to treat various health issues, such as fever, rheumatism, and digestive problems, due to its anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial properties. The plant can be prepared into herbal teas, infusions, or extracts for medicinal use.
